script_system_append: For this campaign, cast a dignified obese or large-bodied Western elderly rider and preserve the same heavier senior body type across all scenes. Avoid hospital, rehab, or caregiver stereotypes unless explicitly requested.
script_user_append: Keep all scenes on one coherent Western home-to-outdoor route, such as porch -> ramp -> backyard path -> quiet neighborhood or woodland edge. Do not jump to unrelated places.
scene_pic_system_append: Use the same rider identity and same wheelchair in every connected scene. Preserve the same large-bodied elderly rider, same outfit, same posture, same wheelchair, and same adult partner if present. No minors. No manual wheelchair substitution.
scene_pic_user_append: Preserve the same rider wardrobe, same large-bodied senior body type, same route direction, and same building materials across scenes. Keep the paired upper rear push handles visible as slim handles above or just behind the backrest, while hiding any rear/lower battery pack or cable.
video_prompt_append: Do not swap rider identity, gender, age, body type, wardrobe, or wheelchair type between scenes. Keep the same dignified large-bodied elderly rider and the same powered wheelchair throughout the whole sequence. Keep the paired upper rear push handles visible without showing a rear/lower battery pack.
